creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195188
py-python-docs-theme.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that adds the Python package textproc/py-python-docs-theme, that provides the official theme for Python documentation.

This port will be needed by devel/py-pip to build the supplied documentation.


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
